recommendations.title: My Blind Brother
recommendations.overview: Love for the same woman causes conflict between an over-achieving blind athlete and the brother who made him that way.
Two university students gain insight into life and love as they get to know each other during a road trip across Europe.

recommendations.title: Kiwi!
recommendations.overview: The story of a Kiwi who spends his whole life working towards achieving his dream.

recommendations.title: Alfie
recommendations.overview: A young man leads a promiscuous lifestyle until several life reversals make him rethink his purposes and goals in life.

recommendations.title: Amélie
recommendations.overview: At a tiny Parisian café, the adorable yet painfully shy Amélie accidentally discovers a gift for helping others. Soon Amelie is spending her days as a matchmaker, guardian angel, and all-around do-gooder. But when she bumps into a handsome stranger,

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Get the Grift
recommendations.overview: After a botched scam, Clóvis bumps into Lohane, his estranged foster sister. In a bind, they soon realize the only way out is to band together.

recommendations.title: The Turning
recommendations.overview: A young woman quits her teaching job to become a private tutor and governess for two wealthy young kids, but soon starts to suspect there’s more to their house than meets the eye.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: French Women
recommendations.overview: A story about 11 girls living in Paris. Each of them has its own problems: career, love life, children. Every girl has their complexes and virtues. They always look elegant, hiding their inner feelings. Will they reach all the goals and overcome all
